zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Woodforde於1428年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 福爾維爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Woodford28歲，母親Alice Berkeley22歲。他於1675年4月19日與Elezabeth Clark在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 福爾維爾結婚。他去世於1498年3月4日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾伯納姆享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Woodforde于1428年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 福爾維爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Woodford28岁，母亲Alice Berkeley22岁。他于1675年4月19日与Elezabeth Clark在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 福爾維爾结婚。他去世于1498年3月4日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾伯納姆享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Woodforde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Woodford
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Woodford in Cheshire, Cornwall, Essex, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire. In Scotland, the name is derived from Woodford in Saint Boswells (Roxburghshire).
History: Thomas Woodford emigrated from Lincolnshire, England, to NY in 1690.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Woodforde was born in 1428, in Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Woodford, was 28 and his mother, Alice Berkeley, was 22. He married Elezabeth Clark on 19 April 1675, in Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 4 March 1498, in Burnham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Woodforde est né en 1428, à Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Woodford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Berkeley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elezabeth Clark le 19 avril 1675, à Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1498, à Burnham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Woodforde 1428 in Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Woodford 28 und seine Mutter Alice Berkeley 22. Er hat am 19. April 1675 in Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Elezabeth Clark geheiratet. Er starb am 4. März 1498 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Burnham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Woodforde è nato il nel 1428 nel Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Woodford, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Alice Berkeley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elezabeth Clark il 19 aprile 1675, nel Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 4 marzo 1498, nel Burnham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Woodfordeが1428年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー フォルヴィルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Woodfordは28歳，母Alice Berkeleyは22歳であった。1675年4月19日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー フォルヴィルでElezabeth Clarkと結婚した。彼は1498年3月4日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブルンハムで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Woodforde(이)가 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 포빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Woodford(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Berkeley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1675년 4월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 포빌에서 Elezabeth Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1498년 3월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 번함에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Woodforde nasceu em 1428, em Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Woodford, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Berkeley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elezabeth Clark em 19 de abril de 1675, em Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 4 de março de 1498, em Burnham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Woodforde родился в 1428 г. в местности ашби фолвилл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Woodford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Berkeley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elezabeth Clark 19 апреля 1675 г. в местности ашби фолвилл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 4 марта 1498 г. в местности бурнам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Woodforde nació en 1428, en Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Woodford, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Berkeley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elezabeth Clark el 19 de abril de 1675, en Ashby Folville, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1498, en Burnham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
